what data does the statusline use to show the current agent's name? because two different sessions show me both the base agent name, instead of showing me the kind:0 data of the current agent's pubkey
The statusline RPC wasn't consulting the identities table for the ordinal; the agent fixed it by adding an identity lookup to properly display agent names with ordinals like "claude1".
the kind:0 we publish should also match that (e.g. claude1)
The agent fixed the kind:0 publish to use the ordinal agent label by adding agent_label to EngineParams and updating callers and the runtime to publish the correct name.
Done. Commit `67074b7b` covers all three surfaces: the statusline RPC, `EngineParams`/`engine_params_for`, and the kind:0 publish in the runtime.
